name: @jgkme/kilo-image-gen-mcp
description: MCP server for image generation and local image manipulation/finalization through Kilo Gateway and compatible providers.

scripts.smoke:openrouter: node ./scripts/smoke-image.mjs --provider openrouter --prompt 'a colorful parrot perched on a branch, simple background'
scripts.smoke:openai: node ./scripts/smoke-image.mjs --provider openai --prompt 'a red panda wearing glasses, clean studio background' --purpose portrait
scripts.demo:finalize: node ./scripts/smoke-image.mjs --tool finalize_image --input-image generated-images/j-gemini-openrouter.png --remove-background true --background-backend imgly --background-model medium --trim true --output generated-images/demo-finalize.png
